steps.title: Identify the passage's three-part pattern
steps.content: The passage moves through three distinct phases: introducing a research team's study, explaining a methodological element (the clustering algorithm), and projecting what their work can accomplish.

steps.title: Select the answer that matches this pattern
steps.content: Choice D captures what the passage actually does. Choices A, B, and C attribute features to the text that aren't there: discussions of applications beyond neighborhoods (A), explanations of planners' interest (B), and summaries of trends (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
